title: aspidium fauriei
intro: Aspidium fauriei, also known as autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium fauriei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues. Aspidium fauriei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
